mr_translation_periodic.reason: periodic boundary condition makes integer grid translation a valid relation

mr_translation_dirichlet.reason: boundary condition is non-periodic; translation changes the physical boundary-value problem

mr_mirror_probe.reason: closed-form data are symmetric enough for a bounded probe, but this roster does not claim a new exact mirror theorem

mr_conservation_probe.reason: output integral drift is recorded as a probe; the evidence claim is the admissibility decision, not solver accuracy
